### Third-Party Information Sharing List (App)

Last Updated: April 20, 2026

Shanghai Tianqi Lingguang Technology Co., Ltd. ("Company," "we," "us," or "our") may integrate third-party Software Development Kits (SDKs), Application Programming Interfaces (APIs), and application plugins into our application products and/or services ("Products" or "Services") to ensure stable operation and enable certain features.

This Third-Party Information Sharing List ("List") is intended to clearly and transparently describe the circumstances under which our primary business scenarios may involve sharing personal information with third parties. However, merely using the App does not mean we will share all of the information described in this List with third parties. We will only share your relevant personal information with partners on a "data minimization" basis when you use specific features and only to the extent necessary to provide you with the requested services.

Third-party processing of personal information is governed by their own privacy policies or personal information processing rules. We recommend that you review the relevant third-party legal documents for details on how third parties handle your information.

Third-party code may change due to version upgrades, strategy adjustments, or other reasons that could affect personal information processing practices. While we cannot monitor all such changes in real time, we commit to making our best efforts to update this List promptly to ensure its accuracy and completeness.

This List is an integral part of our [Privacy Policy](privacy-en.html). For more detailed rules regarding personal information processing, your rights, and how we protect your personal information, please refer to the full [Privacy Policy](privacy-en.html).

## Embedded Third-Party SDK List

| # | SDK Name | Operator | Personal Information Types | Purpose | Sharing Method | Usage Scenario | Required | Privacy Policy |
|---|----------|----------|---------------------------|---------|----------------|----------------|----------|----------------|
| 1 | Sentry SDK | Sentry Software Inc. | Device identifiers, app package name, crash logs, performance data, error stack traces | Diagnosing app errors and performance issues | SDK local collection / backend API | When errors or performance issues occur during use | Yes | https://sentry.io/legal/privacy/ |
| 2 | WeChat OpenSDK Android | Shenzhen Tencent Computer System Co., Ltd. | Device identifiers (Android ID/IDFA), device parameters and system information (device model, OS), network-related information (IP address, carrier), WeChat app installation info, WeChat package name info | Third-party content sharing; WeChat payment; WeChat login | SDK local collection | When sharing to WeChat; using WeChat payment; using WeChat login | Yes | https://support.weixin.qq.com/cgi-bin/mmsupportacctnodeweb-bin/pages/RYiYJkLOrQwu0nb8 |
| 3 | Alibaba Cloud Object Storage (OSS) SDK | Hangzhou Alibaba Cloud Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. | Device identifiers, file information (name, size, type), network information (IP address) | File upload and storage services | Backend API | When uploading recordings, images, and other files | Yes | https://terms.aliyun.com/legal-agreement/terms/suit_bu1_ali_cloud/suit_bu1_ali_cloud202112071754_83380.html |
| 4 | Apple In-App Purchase (StoreKit) SDK | Apple Inc. | Order information, transaction amount, Apple ID information, device identifiers | Implementing Apple in-app purchase | SDK local collection / backend API | When iOS users make in-app purchases | Yes | https://www.apple.com/legal/privacy/ |
| 5 | Alipay App Payment Client SDK | Alipay (Hangzhou) Information Technology Co., Ltd. | Order information, transaction amount, app package name, app signature | Implementing Alipay payment functionality | SDK local collection / backend API | When users pay via Alipay | Yes | https://opendocs.alipay.com/open/54/01g6qm |
| 6 | HTTPDNS-android | Hangzhou Alibaba Cloud Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. | Device identifiers (e.g., IP address), domain name request data | Providing more secure, efficient, and accurate DNS resolution | Backend API | DNS resolution during app usage | Yes | https://terms.aliyun.com/legal-agreement/terms/suit_bu1_ali_cloud/suit_bu1_ali_cloud202112071754_83380.html |
| 7 | OPPO PUSH Client SDK | Guangdong HuanTai Technology Co., Ltd. | Device identifiers (device ID, push token) | Push notifications | SDK local collection | When pushing messages to OPPO device users | Yes | https://open.oppomobile.com/new/developmentDoc/info?id=11228 |
| 8 | vivo Push SDK | vivo Mobile Communication Co., Ltd. | Device identifiers (device ID, push token) | Push notifications | SDK local collection | When pushing messages to vivo device users | Yes | https://dev.vivo.com.cn/documentCenter/doc/878 |
| 9 | UMeng+ Mobile Analytics SDK | UMeng Tongxin (Beijing) Technology Co., Ltd. | Device information (model, OS version), app usage behavior data | Anonymized basic usage statistics | Backend API | When users use the app | Yes | https://www.umeng.com/page/policy |
| 10 | UMeng+ Message Push SDK | UMeng Tongxin (Beijing) Technology Co., Ltd. | Device push token, device identifiers | Notifying users of task status | Backend API | When users upload files for transcription and summarization | Yes | https://www.umeng.com/page/policy |
| 11 | Xiaomi Push SDK | Beijing Xiaomi Mobile Software Co., Ltd. | Device identifiers (OAID, Android ID), app package name, version number, running status, device parameters (manufacturer, model, OS version, language, storage, memory), network information (carrier, type) | Push notifications | SDK local collection | When pushing messages to Xiaomi device users | Yes | https://dev.mi.com/console/doc/detail?pId=1822 |
| 12 | Huawei Performance Acceleration Library | Huawei Software Technologies Co., Ltd. | Device information (model, OS version), running status, memory/storage usage | Improving app performance, fluency, and energy efficiency on Huawei devices | SDK local collection | Performance optimization during app usage | Yes | https://developer.huawei.com/consumer/cn/doc/development/graphics-Guides/sdk-data-security-0000001050700772 |
| 13 | Honor Push SDK | Shenzhen Honor Software Technologies Co., Ltd. | Device identifiers (device ID, push token) | Push notifications | SDK local collection | When pushing messages to Honor device users | Yes | https://developer.honor.com/cn/docs/11002/guides/sdk-data-security |
| 14 | Meizu Push SDK | Zhuhai Xingji Meizu Information Technology Co., Ltd. | Device identifiers (device ID, push token) | Push notifications | SDK local collection | When pushing messages to Meizu device users | Yes | https://open.flyme.cn/docs?id=202 |
